message:
fix(web): correct ActionDrawer 'Selection' label to 'Packaging Pressure'

The mobile ActionDrawer menu item with id='pressure' was mislabeled as
'Selection' but correctly opened the 'pressure' overlay (Packaging
Pressure analysis). Fixed the label to match the actual overlay name
for user clarity.

Fixes: phage_explorer-s4qx.1.7.2
